issues.message: Raw overcapture: bar data starts 2024.06.03 23:50 which is before manifest window_from 2024.06.04 17:25. Parser-level clipping required.
Trade log has 11 ENTRY trade(s) before manifest window_from 2024.06.04 17:25. Parser-level clipping will exclude these.
Bar range [2024.06.03 23:50 ~ 2025.04.01 23:50] vs manifest window [2024.06.04 17:25 ~ 2025.04.02 09:00]. Raw overcapture (if any) will be clipped at parser level.
